no: Install Song & Silence after Rogue Rebalancing.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: S&S comp 0 modifies bard spell progression, but has built-in cdtweaks detection — skips its own change if cdtweaks #2270/#2271 is installed. Self-resolving conflict.
conflicts.myComps: #0 Changes to trueclass bards and thieves
conflicts.source: S&S tp2: REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED cdtweak 2270/2271; neither comp

conflicts.reason: SnS cn:0 and ToF cn:1520 both modify clabba02.2da (bard CLAB) and luba0.2da (bard song table). Last installed wins. SnS kits (cn:2 Acrobat, cn:4 Dirgesinger) are NEW kits with own CLAB files — safe. ToF cn:41000 rebalances Jester/Skald kits — doesn't overlap with SnS kits.
conflicts.myComps: #0 Changes to trueclass bards and thieves

new: Improved bard song with scaling bonuses.
Thief ability to blend into shadows.

passive.desc: Lore value is halved compared to base bard

Gains 12 priest spells as wizard-type (uses bard slots): Armor of Faith, CLW, Doom, Chant, Slow Poison, Draw Upon Holy Might, Glyph of Warding, CMW, Defensive Harmony, Holy Power, Mass Cure, Bolt of Glory

spellRestrictions.note: Gains 12 priest spells as wizard-type (castable from bard slots): Armor of Faith, CLW, Doom, Chant, Slow Poison, Draw Upon Holy Might, Glyph of Warding, CMW, Defensive Harmony, Holy Power, Mass Cure, Bolt of Glory.

statBonus.note: Standard bard requirements. Half lore, half pick pockets.

spellRestrictions.note: Standard bard spellcasting (half lore). Gains Horror/Confusion/Animate Dead as innates.

passive.desc: Bard Song charms enemies: save vs Spells at +2, with -1 penalty per 5 bard levels

activated.effects: Opposite of Bless: -1 THAC0 and saves for enemies in area.

restrictions.items: Cannot learn Conjuration, Invocation, or Transmutation spells

passive.desc: +5% Open Locks and Find/Remove Traps every 2 levels
+1 to all saves at levels 1, 8, and 14 (total +3)

statBonus.note: No backstab multiplier. Gains Set Traps at normal rate.

passive.desc: +10% Find Traps, Hide in Shadows, Move Silently, Open Locks

restrictions.items: Can Specialize (2 pips) in daggers, darts, slings. Set Traps gained at half rate (every 10 levels vs 5).

statBonus.note: +10% Find Traps/Hide/Move Silently/Open Locks. -20% Pick Pockets/Set Traps.

activated.effects: Creates a short sword lasting 1 round/level. +1 enchantment per tier, heals 1 HP/hit. THAC0/damage bonus and range improve by +1 per 5 levels (max +5 at lv25).

restrictions.items: Cannot set traps. Only 15 skill points per level (vs 25). Can achieve Mastery (3 pips) in short swords.

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting. Uses psionic Mind Blade innate.

activated.effects: Assassin's Poison Weapon but only works on ranged attacks (melee removed).

restrictions.items: Grand Mastery (5 pips) in all missile weapons. No backstab.

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (thief kit). Poison Weapon only works on ranged.

statBonus.note: No backstab multiplier. Grand Mastery in all missile weapons.

passive.desc: +5% Hide in Shadows and Move Silently per 2 levels

activated.effects: Summons a shadow creature that scales with level (4 tiers).

activated.freq: 1/day at lv8, +1 at lv14 and lv20

restrictions.items: Cannot set traps. Only 15 skill points per level (vs 25). Non-EE only (EE has built-in Shadowdancer).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (thief kit). Gains Reflected Image, Summon Shadow, Shadow Door as innates.

statBonus.note: Only 15 skill points per level. Cannot set traps. Non-EE only.

new: Entertainer from carnivals and circuses. Tumbling, balance, and evasion abilities.
Sacred singer whose hymns carry divine power. Enhanced healing and buffing songs.
Singer of sorrow and doom. Songs debuff enemies with fear, weakness, and despair.
Musician who charms and controls creatures with enchanting melodies. Rat-catcher origins.
Jack-of-all-trades thief focused on exploration rather than crime. Balanced skills.
Expert at breaking and entering. Enhanced Pick Locks, Find Traps, and stealth.
Psionic thief who manifests a blade of mental energy. Psychic combat abilities.
Stealthy ranged specialist preferring to engage enemies from a distance.
Nimble warrior operating between light and darkness. Shadow Step and stealth mastery.

sum: This mod adds many options for those who use thieves and bards in Baldur's Gate and Baldur's Gate II.

co.n: Changes to trueclass bards and thieves, and unmodded game kits (required for other components)
co.tp2n: Changes to trueclass bards and thieves, and unmodded game kits (required for other components)
co.no: Required for all other components. Has built-in detection for RR, IWDification, and cdtweaks — auto-skips bard table changes if those mods are present.

co.n: Add new bardic store and thief items
co.tp2n: Add new bardic store and thief items
co.no: Adds new magical instruments for bards and specialized thief items to shops.
Acrobat bard kit. Flashy entertainer with tumbling abilities, bonus to AC and thief skills. Gains Bard Song that improves AC/saves. Restricted from heavy armor.
Chorister bard kit. Temple musician and missionary with divine-flavored Bard Song that heals and protects allies. Can Turn Undead. Restricted from edged weapons.
Dirgesinger bard kit. Melancholy bard whose songs of sorrow debuff enemies — lowering morale, causing despair. Gains fear and horror abilities. Cannot inspire allies.
Luring Piper bard kit. Vermin control specialist whose enchanting song charms foes into traps. Gains charm and domination abilities. Less effective in direct combat.
Adventurer thief kit. Jack-of-all-trades, more reliable and trustworthy than typical thieves. Bonus to Open Locks, Find Traps, and Detect Illusions. No backstab penalty but fewer skill points.
Burglar thief kit. Expert at breaking and entering — bonus to Find Traps, Hide in Shadows, Open Locks, and Detect Illusions. Reduced combat ability.
Soulknife thief kit. Psionic thief who creates a blade of pure psychic energy. Gains psionic attack abilities. No proficiency in normal weapons beyond the soul blade.
Sharpshooter thief kit. Ranged combat specialist preferring bolts and arrows over melee. Bonus to ranged THAC0 and damage. Reduced melee ability and thief skill points.
Blocked on all Enhanced Edition games (REQUIRE_PREDICATE !GAME_IS bgee bg2ee iwdee eet). Legacy component for original BG2 only.
